title: DSE / CE 化學 Chemistry MC Answers By Year (2008-2025)
seoTitle: DSE / CE Chemistry MC Answers By Year (1990-2025) · 歷屆化學MC答案
seoDescription: 快速查閱 DSE／CE 化學 Chem MC 答案 (1990–2025)｜完整收錄歷屆多項選擇題答案，包括 2008–2025 年 DSE Chemistry Paper 2 及 1990–2007 年會考 Chem MC 答案，方便操卷、核對與溫習
author: Jable
content:
Looking for a quick, reliable reference for all HKDSE Chemistry multiple-choice answers in Paper 2 by year? You’re found the right place. We have complied the official and accurate MC answers from past DSE and CE Chemistry exams, helping you check your work and identify trends across years. Whether you’re revising or practicing timed MC questions, having consolidated answers at your fingertips can boost your efficiency and confidence.

想快速查找香港中學文憑/會考化學, 歷屆選擇題答案嗎？這篇文章為你整理了由歷年HKDSE及中學會考官方化學選擇題的正確答案，方便你自我檢核及掌握趨勢。不論你是備考還是練習做題，這個答案匯總都是提升效率和信心的必備利器！
